channel.title: GitHub MDX Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of MDX in GitHub

item.description: Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

item.description: 🐙 Guides, papers, lecture, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering

item.description: Astro documentation

item.title: OnedocLabs/react-print-pdf
item.description: Build and generate PDF using React 📄 UI kit for PDFs and print documents. Simple, reusable components and templates to create great invoices, docs, brochures. Use your favorite front-end framework React to build your next PDF.

item.title: yewstack/yew
item.description: Rust / Wasm framework for creating reliable and efficient web applications

item.description: Taiko's end user documentation.
